creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: flo
Date: Thu May 16 23:06:18 2013
New Revision: 318344
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/318344

Log:
  Fix pkg-plist
  
  PR:		ports/178693
  Submitted by:	John Marino <draco@marino.st>

Modified:
  head/www/phpmyfaq/Makefile
  head/www/phpmyfaq/pkg-plist

Modified: head/www/phpmyfaq/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/phpmyfaq/Makefile	Thu May 16 22:54:58 2013	(r318343)
+++ head/www/phpmyfaq/Makefile	Thu May 16 23:06:18 2013	(r318344)
@@ -1,12 +1,9 @@

-# Date created:		2005-04-15
-# Whom:			chinsan <chinsan@mail2000.com.tw>
-#
+# Created by: chinsan <chinsan@mail2000.com.tw>
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	phpmyfaq
 PORTVERSION=	2.7.9
+PORTREVISION=	1
 CATEGORIES=	www
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.phpmyfaq.de/download/

==============================================================================
